chainComplete.description: Whether the causal chain must stitch end-to-end (a complete chain has no orphan).

orphans.description: The exact set of orphan-event descriptors the detector must report (order-insensitive).

decisions.description: The expected number of stitched fired-Decision traces.

tasks.description: The expected number of stitched Task resolutions.

description: The pinned expected observations of assembling a DecisionRecord case fixture.
